CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks EFS volumes restrict VPC access
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks EFS volumes restrict access to specific VPC resources instead of allowing every resource in the VPC to connect.
Risk: EFS volumes allowing all VPC resources broaden access beyond least privilege within the network.

Recommendation.Text: Restrict EFS volume access to specific VPC resources instead of allowing all resources in the VPC.
